name: kimiqb
description: KimiQB packages a repo-aware Kimi Code planning workflow with an existing-project autopsy, phase sub-plans, QA audit, and gated implementation handoff.
author: Alican Kiraz

interface.shortDescription: Repo-aware planning workflow for Kimi Code
interface.longDescription: KimiQB helps Kimi Code inspect a repository, ask repo-aware intake questions, create a master project plan, autopsy existing project state, decompose the plan into phase-level sub-plans, audit the planning package for coverage and readiness, then print a gated implementation handoff when the audit allows it.
